faqs.question: Is Arvindbhai Patel Institute of Environmental Design a good college/institute?
faqs.answer: Established in 1980, D.C. Patel School of Architecture, Arvindbhai Patel Institute of Environmental Design (APIED Vallabh Vidyanagar) is a private college. APIED has received affiliation from Sardar Patel University. Arvindbhai Patel Institute of Environmental Design courses offer a range of undergraduate and graduate programmes, including bachelor's degrees in Architecture and Interior Design. APIED course admissions are merit-based. Arvindbhai Patel Institute of Environmental BArch and BA admissions are based on GUJCET and the previous year’s qualifying exam score.

review_summary.college_name: S.V. Arts College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: 1. 20–30% of students only get placed here. 2. The highest package is 600000, the lowest is 100000 and the average package is 300000. 3. TCS, Infosys, Reliance, and finance companies are the top recruiting companies. 4. 60% of students get their internships from companies like Unschool, Think Champ, TakeOff, etc. 5. Software developer, data entry operator, business administration, business analyst, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: 1. The infrastructure facilities are lacking, like Wi-Fi. And there is a lab with only a few computer systems; classrooms are good. The library has better infrastructure at my college. 2. The food is purely vegetarian because it was a TTD college, the mess is good and the medical facilities are very bad. Sports and games are great in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Biotechnology, Botany, Chemistry) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in Andhra Pradesh.

content.Placements: The college had almost 600 students. Our college did not provide good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided good infrastructure. There were huge laboratories for research purposes. I would recommend students join this college. Classrooms were spacious. The college offered hostels for free for top scorers. The library was equipped with up-to-date books and provided many useful facilities. The hostel facilities were excellent.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were well-qualified and excellent. They explained things to students very effectively. Our college offered many courses. The course curriculum was relevant. The pass percentage was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Microbiology, Dairy Science, Chemistry) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: We have to be open with faculty members to gather in-depth knowledge.

content.Placements: There are 29 students in our course. Many students got placed in this course. Almost 75% of students got internships in agricultural companies and laboratories. Top roles are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. Mobile phones are allowed on our campus. Laboratories are well-equipped. Classrooms are very good. There is a decent library and several books are available. Hostel is very good. The food served in the mess is decent. Canteen is not available. Medical facilities are good. Sports are conducted in this college. There is a gym facility on our campus. A playground is available for sports like hockey, basketball, table tennis, and cricket.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Zoology, Physics, Chemistry) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges in Andhra Pradesh.

content.Placements: First of all, this college doesn't provide placements because it is a degree college under the maintenance of Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams, or TTD. In our college, we have specialized groups with good teaching faculty. Every department has its own special teaching skills.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, there are bigger science laboratories for practical and research purposes. The college library is located on the college campus and has updated books. Still, there is no Wi-Fi facility for students. The quality of the food provided by the hostel is very healthy and tasty. Everything is available in our campus canteen, and there are bigger sports grounds. Near our hostel are RUIA and SVIMS hospitals.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (History, Economics, Political Science) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Its pretty old model type of college better if we just need a degree .

content.Placements: There won't be any placement opportunities provided by the college they are very limited we ourselves to search for placements even the alumni isn't that good. B.Sc. students can get chances and for B.A. there won't be much scope for getting placed directly from college.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good and are providing for very less fee mess is also good eatable but mostly the items repeat and there won't be non veg. Classrooms are old library is good but contains old books not updated but has internet facility and newspapers and magazines are provided.

faqs.answer: FutureLearn and Coursera have a similar model of helping learners upskill with the latest courses and university partnerships. Affordability-wise, FutureLearn is better as it costs around INR 1100 per month, while Coursera costs around USD 49 (roughly INR 4500) per month. Another benefit of FutureLearn is that the certificates for its short-term courses online come with CPD credits. That can help freshers and professionals showcase on their LinkedIn profile or while pursuing their college education. While Coursera's certificates are globally known, they do not come with credits.

paragraphs: Swaminarayan Universityadmission 2026is open for all courses. The university offers courses such as B.E/BTech., BBA, BHMS, M.E, MBA, etc at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD, Diploma and Certificate courses. Admissions are entrance-based as per respective courses. Candidates must meet the eligibility set by the university.

Swaminarayan University course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Swaminarayan University admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Swaminarayan University is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Swaminarayan University Application Process 2026

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://admission.swaminarayanuniversity.ac.in/. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores, such as NEET, PhD entrance exam, etc, for admission to the MBBS, PhD course among courses. Post selection criteria, students must visit the university campus for the counselling process. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification. Aspirants need t pay theSwaminarayan University feeto confirm their seats at the university.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of college.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best, in fact, great infrastructure, with a 7-floor building and two lifts. It also has a big classroom equipped with projectors. The campus has one large central library that is well-equipped with books, and every classroom has an AC in working condition.

reviews.review_heading: About infrastructure and facility you can SEE in our photos.
reviews.review_text: Water supply, solar system, coolers, etc. Medical facilities are good for emergency purposes, and regarding sports, we have a TT table and gymnasium for physical workouts. Healthy food is provided by our mess. There are 2 to 3 messes in our campus for lunch and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: The best and experience college.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities and infrastructure are available BSC in microbiology such as  wi-fi, best lab technology, very Big class room and library. Hostel is very best and experienced. Mess is there in hostel but they do not not add garlic and onion in food. Cricket, volleyball, football ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: Some of the faculty members were violent and did misbehaviour.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facility. Labs are not equipped with enough instruments. Labs are not properly managed. Classrooms did not have proper seating arrangements. There was no sufficient place for reading in the library, but they managed it.

reviews.review_heading: College that can provide a course of your dreams and really good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: They provide computer labs, free Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, lifts to reach the top floor, and parking space for personal vehicles. In our hostel, there is a gym and an outdoor ground to play in the evening, and the food quality is very good. They also provide a cricket ground and a football ground for playing.

reviews.review_heading: Take admission if you just want a degree, not for skills and knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Shree Swaminarayan Ayurvedic College has good infrastructure with a large campus, a canteen, a cricket playground, a football ground, a volleyball net with required equipment. No Wi-Fi facilities for students. Labs are decent, and basic library is common, and mess food is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by ASMI Business School -Techno India UniversityReviewed on 5 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good college atmosphere and also great professors.
reviews.review_text: When anyone enters this college, they will think that this is a college or a 5-star hotel. Very well maintained and centralized AC rooms and corridors; very neat and clean washrooms with AC; good experience in libraries as well as computer labs.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in West Bengal, and its fee is less.
reviews.review_text: Our college didn't provide hostels. It does not have a hostel in which the living of all students is mandatory. Our college provides hostels to students who want to be accommodated. I live in a rented flat, and all the other students are day scholars only. They provide air conditioners.

reviews.review_heading: There should be more time between two semesters and the teacher-student ratio should be better.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is pretty good in our university; there is central AC, a modern classroom, a canteen with properly maintained labs and a library. 
Faculties are very good and cooperative; they will help you in any situation but there is no mess in our university; medical and sports facilities are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by ASMI Business School -Techno India UniversityReviewed on 24 Jan 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I like the faculty and I feel that I had the best environment for students.
reviews.review_text: The main building houses a principle office and administrative office, Auditorium, Av room, central instrumentation facility, computer labs, Science departments, classrooms, a staff room, etc. The annexure building has a few classrooms, a canteen facility and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, you can start a good career from there.
reviews.review_text: The rooms and libraries were well-structured, with Wi-Fi and lift service. It had a very big playground and a well-decorated campus. There was a gym facility and a medical facility too. I was not sure about the hostel, but the college canteen food was really good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Software Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college campus is very good.

content.Placements: The placements of this college are not good. No companies recruit here to offer placement opportunities. The highest salary package offered here is 7 LPA and minimum is 2 LPA. Placements record is very poor. No internships are offered by the college. In our batch, there are 30 students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good. There are 2 cricket grounds, 1 football ground, 1 basketball ground, 1 hockey ground, 1 handball ground and many other grounds available. There are very less amount of fest held by the University. The quality of the hostel is good, there are 15 hostels in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Hamidia Girls Degree College.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students get placed. The average salary package is 2 to 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Qtv, Etv, Etv Bharat, and All India radio. All the students got internships through recommendation letters granted by the college in various media houses. The top roles offered are reporter, video editor, InDesign operator, video maker, audio editor, cameraman, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. Everything is available. There is Wi-Fi, well-maintained media labs, and studio for editing and photography, and own media research cell. Center media studies have a library that is different from the central library with all the books related to the field of media. Hostel is available. Food offered in the hostel is good. There is no canteen. Sports are run by the different departments that are sports boards situated in the center. They organise sports events every year. Medical facilities are available in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good option to opt for professional courses.

content.Placements: The placement cell of our college is completely wonderful. It not only promises you good placement if your grades are good but also offers you various internships in some renowned organisations during the final semesters.
content.Infrastructure: Our college does not stand with the ancient structure from outside, and our institute has all the modern gadgets and accessories required for the overall development of students, be it MAC books, expensive cameras and a media studio. So, hostel and college infrastructure support ancient culture along with the essence of modernisation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Software Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College campus is very good.

content.Placements: Placement of this college is very good there was about 90% of student place in our course the highest salary package offered year is 6 LPA and minimum salary packages is 2Lpa and average salary packages 3lpa. There is no internship opportunities were offered in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure of this College and department is very good there is free campus Wi-Fi in all campus in classrooms in lab there is two library and classrooms were neat and clean. The facility in hostel is not so good the condition of hostel is not so good food available in mesh was average medical facilities were provided and there is not so much scope of a sports in game.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a top college in Allahabad.

content.Placements: There are no placement facilities in Allahabad University. However, the fee is very less, and every type of student from different places of India study here.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen is available for hostel students, and day scholars can also purchase food there. Average quality food is provided for students at a minimum price. Overall, the canteen is good, and the fee of the hostel is very less. So, any student can able to pay the fee, and the hostel is also not a very long distance.
content.Faculty: Teachers here are average, but they are experienced.
